chain.thought: Explanation: The elapsed times for rows 3–10 are at least 3 days (3:06:02:29, 3:06:11:29, 3:09:19:00, 3:11:00:26, 3:14:41:28, 3:14:58:46, 3:15:28:24, 3:16:04:40), while rows 1 and 2 are under 3 days (2:19:03:32, 2:21:55:06). Therefore, 8 yachts took at least 3 days to complete the race.

judge_thought: Explanation: The elapsed times are given in d:hh:mm:ss. Rows 1 and 2 have 2 days (2:19:03:32 and 2:21:55:06), which are less than 3 days. Rows 3 through 10 each have 3 days (starting at 3:06:02:29 and up), so they meet the "at least 3 days" criterion. That totals 8 yachts.
